file_insights.changes_summary: Complete refactoring of feedback API to use database persistence with Drizzle ORM
key_modifications: Replaced in-memory feedbackManager with direct database interactions
Updated GET endpoint to fetch recommendation feedback from database
Updated POST endpoint to insert/update feedback directly in recommendations table

patterns_discovered: Zod schema validation for input sanitization
Comprehensive error handling with structured JSON responses
gotchas_discovered: Previous implementation was fully in-memory with complex feedback management
Complex legacy code with multiple action types replaced with simpler, more direct database operations
Significant reduction in code complexity by removing multiple handler functions
recommendations: Consider extracting database queries into separate service layer
Add more comprehensive logging for tracking feedback submissions
Implement caching mechanisms for frequently accessed feedback data
Create more granular permission checks for feedback operations
